experiment.name: CALO-RPD comparative experiment
experiment.config_json: {"name": "CALO-RPD comparative experiment", "case_name": "case30", "algorithms": ["CALO"], "runs": 5, "master_seed": 2026, "population_size": 50, "max_iterations": 1000, "budget": {"policy": "equal_evaluations", "max_evaluations": 100, "wall_clock_seconds": null}, "objective": {"kind": "active_power_loss", "weight_loss": 1.0, "weight_voltage_deviation": 0.0, "weight_l_index": 0.0, "loss_scale": 1.0, "voltage_deviation_scale": 1.0, "l_index_scale": 1.0}, "variables": {"generator_voltages": true, "transformer_taps": true, "shunt_compensation": true, "discrete_transformer_taps": true, "discrete_shunts": true, "transformer_minimum": 0.9, "transformer_maximum": 1.1, "transformer_step": 0.0125, "shunt_controls": []}, "robust_objective": {"aggregation": "expected", "risk_lambda": 1.0, "cvar_alpha": 0.95}, "scenarios": {"mode": "deterministic", "count": 20, "active_load_std": 0.05, "reactive_load_std": 0.05, "branch_outages": [], "generator_outages": [], "renewable_bus": 0, "renewable_rated_mw": 0.0, "renewable_mean_capacity_factor": 0.5, "renewable_std_capacity_factor": 0.15}, "algorithm_parameters": {"CALO": {"policy_checkpoint": "C:\\Users\\User\\Downloads\\calo-rpd-studio-v1.0.0\\calo-rpd-studio\\calo_rpd_studio\\data\\trained_models\\calo_policy_v1.pt", "deterministic_policy": false}, "TLBO": {}, "PSO": {"inertia": 0.7298, "c1": 1.49618, "c2": 1.49618}, "CLPSO": {"refresh_gap": 7, "c": 1.49445}, "MTLA-DE": {"f": 0.5, "cr": 0.9}, "QODE": {"f": 0.5, "cr": 0.9}, "DA": {}, "SA": {"temperature": 1.0, "cooling": 0.995, "step_scale": 0.1}, "SSA": {}, "ACO": {"q": 0.5, "xi": 0.85}, "BA": {"loudness": 0.9, "pulse_rate": 0.5}, "CSA": {"awareness_probability": 0.1, "flight_length": 2.0}, "FA": {"alpha": 0.2, "beta0": 1.0, "gamma": 1.0}, "FPA": {"switch_probability": 0.8}, "GOA": {}, "GWO": {}, "MFO": {}, "MVO": {}, "WOA": {"spiral_b": 1.0}, "ICA": {"imperialists": 5}}, "output_directory": "results_data", "parallel_workers": 8}
